title: Alexander Yudin
text: Home * People * Alexander Yudin Alexander D. Yudin , (Александр Д. Юдин) a Russian computer scientist and researcher in artificial intelligence . From 1972 until 1980 [1] , Alexander Yudin worked with Mikhail Botvinnik and Boris Stilman et al. on the project Pioneer , in partuclar, he worked on Pioneer's opening book [2] and endgame library.
